citations.narrative:
The facility did not document an annual review of its contingency plan in 2025. According to records, the most recent
documented annual review took place on December 19, 2024.
The annual review and documentation of such review improves emergency preparedness by ensuring that contingency
planning incorporates potential facility and circumstantial changes since the last review.
Correct by ensuring the contingency plan is reviewed by the research facility on at least an annual basis. Each registrant
must maintain documentation of their annual reviews, including documenting any amendments or changes made to their
plan since the previous year's review. All annual review documentation must be made available to APHIS upon request.
Correct by: February 27, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.38(l)(2) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
The facility did not document an annual review of its contingency plan in 2025. According to records, the most recent 
documented annual review took place on December 19, 2024.  
 
The annual review and documentation of such review improves emergency preparedness by ensuring that contingency 
planning incorporates potential facility and circumstantial changes since the last review. 
 
Correct by ensuring the contingency plan is reviewed by the research facility on at least an annual basis. Each registrant 
must maintain documentation of their annual reviews, including documenting any amendments or changes made to their 
plan since the previous year's review. All annual review documentation must be made available to APHIS upon request. 
Correct by: February 27, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
